evals.prompt: Take ownership of this repo and turn the current local AI tester into a real dashboard with runtime, voice, and agent surfaces. Do not stop at code — leave it feeling productized.
evals.expected_output: The agent chooses an end-to-end shape, implements across multiple surfaces, verifies the real path, and reports the highest-leverage next step.

evals.prompt: You drive. Fix the runtime bug, simplify the architecture, update docs, and make the local stack feel production-ready without asking me to micromanage every step.
evals.expected_output: The agent makes decisive architecture and implementation choices, verifies runtime truth, and improves the surrounding product surfaces.

evals.prompt: Od a do z, z wow efektem: package this rough internal tool so a teammate can discover it, run it, trust it, and want to keep using it.
evals.expected_output: The agent treats the task as a full product slice, not a narrow patch, and closes packaging, UX, docs, and runtime gaps.
